description: Minimal desktop capabilities for the Eventra Business Admin shell. External-link opening uses the opener plugin restricted to standard web schemes (default-urls). Cross-app launching (Internal OS / Mobile) goes through the app's own `eventra_launch`/`eventra_app_installed` commands, which enforce a scheme+route allowlist in Rust — no plugin permission widens the opener scope to custom schemes, and no shell/exec permission is granted. Deep-link registration and inbound-URL handling run entirely in Rust.
